chapter.title: Processing Model (XForms 1.1 Chapter 4)
chapter.para: This chapter maps lifecycle events and deferred processing behavior to SaxonForms runtime dispatch, recalculate/revalidate/refresh orchestration, and DOM updates.

section.title: Event mapping: XForms to DOM/runtime events
section.para: The XForms processing model defines a lifecycle that begins with model construction and culminates in a ready state where the form is interactive. SaxonForms implements this lifecycle through named templates in saxon-xforms.xsl that execute in sequence during the xformsjs-main entry point (L154).

section.title: Model construction phase
section.para: The xformsjs-main template (L154) orchestrates model construction:

listitem.para: Document parsing — The XForms source is read from the page DOM via ixsl:page(). The source may be an embedded xforms:xform element or an XHTML document with XForms in the <head>. Namespace declarations are propagated via addNamespaceDeclarationsToDocument() (L4069).

Model and instance resolution — Models ($models, L222) and the default instance ($first-instance, L227) are extracted. Default IDs are assigned if not present ($global-default-model-id, $global-default-instance-id, L100–101).

Submission map construction — The $submissions variable (L276) builds a map(xs:string, map(*)) of all xforms:submission elements, keyed by ID, containing method, resource, serialization, replace mode, and other attributes.

xforms-model-construct — The xforms-model-construct template (L5205) initializes each model: loads instance data (inline or from @src), saves initial instance snapshots for xf:reset, and stores instances in JavaScript global state.

xforms-rebuild — The xforms-rebuild template (L5296) processes xforms:bind elements via the add-context mode (L5321), resolving @nodeset paths to absolute references and annotating binds with @instance-context.
xforms-recalculate — The xforms-recalculate template (L5392) evaluates all @calculate, @relevant, @readonly, @required, and @constraint expressions on binds via xforms-recalculate-binding (L5431).

Validation stage boundary — In the default construction path, SaxonForms performs xforms-rebuild and xforms-recalculate before dispatching xforms-model-construct-done. xforms-revalidate runs during deferred update cycles and submission validation rather than as a mandatory construction step.

xforms-model-construct-done — Dispatched after construction completes. Action handlers bound to this event (e.g., setvalue on xforms-model-construct-done) execute here. Known issue: event handler execution during model construction does not always update instance values (4.2.2.b).

Control rendering — XForms control elements are matched by templates (entry point L2190) and transformed to HTML. The get-properties mode (L637) resolves data bindings for each control. The set-action mode (L847) builds action maps. The registerOutput template (L4901) registers output controls for refresh tracking.
xforms-ready — Dispatched when the form is fully initialized and rendered. The form enters the interactive state.

section.title: Deferred update cycle
section.para: After each user interaction or action execution, SaxonForms runs the deferred update cycle: recalculate → revalidate → refresh. This cycle is triggered by:

listitem.para: xforms-value-changed (L5635) — Fired when a form control value changes via the ixsl:onchange event handlers.
Action execution — Insert, delete, and setvalue actions trigger recalculation after modifying instance data.
Explicit dispatch — The action-recalculate (L7913), action-revalidate, and action-refresh (L7927) templates handle explicit xf:recalculate/xf:revalidate/xf:refresh actions.

section.para: The recalculate phase (xforms-recalculate, L5392) iterates binds and evaluates MIP expressions. The recalculate-binding template (L5431) evaluates each bind's @calculate expression and updates the instance node value if changed. For non-incremental <select>/<select1> controls, the deferred cycle runs inline during onchange to avoid duplicate outer dispatch (L493–509; resolved: 4.6.3.a/b/c).

The revalidate phase (xforms-revalidate, L5531) checks required fields, constraint expressions, and XSD type validity. During each cycle, validation MIP state (valid/required) is rebuilt into a runtime registry keyed by instance ID and binding reference, and validation state changes dispatch xforms-valid/xforms-invalid events (resolved: 6.1.6.a).

The refresh phase (xforms-refresh, L5622) updates the DOM to reflect current model state: refreshOutputs-JS (L4345) updates output/control values and projects validation CSS classes from the revalidate registry, refreshRepeats-JS (L4462) regenerates repeat content, refreshRelevantFields-JS (L4550) shows/hides controls based on relevant MIP, and refreshElementsUsingIndexFunction-JS (L4629) updates elements whose values depend on index().

section.title: Processing-cycle sequence diagram
section.para: This sequence diagram drives chapter-level interaction tracing requirements. Each edge maps to an identifiable implementation hook in the source code. Line numbers in participant labels and message annotations reference saxon-xforms.xsl.

listitem.para: 4.2.1.a/d, 4.2.2.a, 4.2.3.a, 4.5.2.a — Model-construction crash when model has no instance. Resolved by making $context-node parameter optional (node()?) in evaluate-xpath-with-context-node.
4.2.2.b — xforms-model-construct-done setvalue handler does not clear instance data during model construction. Root cause: event handler execution timing during model construction.
4.2.2.c1 — Form control referencing instance not yet loaded; output hidden after xforms-ready. Root cause: lazy instance resolution timing.
4.4.1.a — xforms-insert event properties (inserted-nodes) not populated in event handler after trigger click.
4.6.3.a/b/c — Resolved: Non-incremental select/select1 onchange now performs inline recalculate/revalidate/refresh to avoid duplicate outer deferred-cycle dispatch.
Targeted W3C coverage: tests/xforms/w3c/ch04.spec.ts.
Sequence trace checkpoints must map each message to concrete runtime hooks and ordered [SEQTRACE] template chains in tests/xforms/w3c/sequence-trace.spec.ts.
Verify deferred update cycle description against non-incremental select fix (4.6.3.a/b/c).
Regression command for final acceptance: npm run test:gate.
